meaning: n.季节性牲畜移动(指迁移至合适的放牧地)
examples: The company also runs trips to coincide with the spring transhumance, which takes place in the first week of June.
The charm of the region no doubt lies in this adherence to traditional ways of life, and the transhumance is a vital - and ever more central - part of this.
Its most recent initiative was a festival celebrating transhumance, the ancient custom of moving animals between winter and summer pastures.
